summary: Iteration 117: Verified 5 features - Mira display name change, Admin notification bell buzzer, FitPage Add to Cart, DinePage date restriction, Mobile two-tile grid. All features working correctly.

verified_features.details: Button shows 'Ask Mira!' in tooltip and 'Mira ✨' label. Changed from 'Ask Meera'. Verified in MiraFloatingButton.jsx lines 74 and 106.

verified_features.feature: Admin NotificationBell - Buzzing animation for new members
verified_features.details: NotificationBell.jsx has hasNewMemberNotification check (lines 181-183). Bell gets animate-wiggle class when new member notifications exist (line 196). CSS wiggle animation defined in index.css lines 79-88.
Found 5 Add to Cart buttons with data-testid='add-bundle-{id}'. Clicking shows toast '🎉 Added to Cart!' and opens cart drawer with item.

verified_features.feature: DinePage - Date input prevents past dates
verified_features.details: Reservation modal date input has min='2026-01-29' (today's date). Prevents selecting past dates.

verified_features.feature: Mobile two-tile grid layout on pillar pages
verified_features.details: Shop page shows 2-column grid on mobile (390px viewport). Found grid-cols-2 containers with proper responsive layout.

critical_code_review_comments: NotificationBell has proper animation logic for new member notifications
FitPage Add to Cart integrates with useCart context and shows toast feedback
DinePage date input dynamically sets min to today's date
Mobile grid layout uses grid-cols-2 for responsive 2-column display
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 features from iteration 117 verified: 1) MiraFloatingButton shows 'Ask Mira' not 'Ask Meera', 2) Admin NotificationBell has wiggle animation for new member notifications, 3) FitPage Add to Cart works with toast notification, 4) DinePage date input prevents past dates with min attribute, 5) Mobile pillar pages use 2-column grid layout.
